description: Production safety contract for ILMA single owner command interface

rules.name: no_production_deploy_without_explicit_approval
rules.description: Production deployments require explicit owner approval

rules.name: no_external_publish_without_explicit_approval
rules.description: External publishing (PyPI, npm, etc.) requires explicit owner approval

rules.name: no_dependency_install_without_approval
rules.description: Installing new dependencies requires explicit owner approval

rules.name: no_destructive_delete
rules.description: Destructive delete operations (rm -rf, DROP TABLE, etc.) are blocked

rules.name: no_os_build
rules.description: OS-level builds (kernel, drivers, system packages) are blocked without approval

rules.name: no_secret_exfiltration
rules.description: Extracting secrets, credentials, or sensitive data is blocked

rules.name: no_network_scan_without_approval
rules.description: Network scanning (nmap, masscan, port scanning) requires explicit approval

rules.name: checkpoint_before_risky_refactor
rules.description: Checkpoint must be created before risky refactoring operations

rules.name: rollback_on_failed_gate
rules.description: Failed gates must trigger automatic rollback to last checkpoint

rules.name: claim_boundary_enforced
rules.description: Claim boundary must be enforced on all final reports
